title: Greenidge Generation (GREE) Earnings Summary - Q1-Q4 2026 Performance
text: Greenidge Generation (GREE) Earnings Summary. Upcoming Earnings: Q2 2026 Estimated Date Monday May 18 2026 (before market open). Conference Call Friday May 15 2026 at 7:00 AM ET. Most Recent Results (Q1 2026) Released May 15 2026: EPS -$0.29, Revenue $20.84 million, Trailing EPS $0.27, P/E Ratio 5.44. Historical Performance by Quarter: Q4 2025 EPS $0.19 Revenue $12.34M beat consensus by $0.69. Q3 2025 EPS $0.75 Revenue $26.87M beat consensus by $1.22. Q2 2025 EPS -$0.27 Revenue $12.90M beat consensus by $0.17. Q1 2025 EPS -$0.40. Q2 2024 EPS -$0.55 Revenue $13.06M missed by $0.18. Q1 2024 EPS -$0.37 Revenue $19.33M missed by $0.03.
